mapper.sql: c.id, c.consumer_code, c.name, c.user_id, u.real_name AS user_real_name, u.username AS user_username, c.secret_key, c.status
mapper.select: select from routing_consumers c left join users u on c.user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0 order by c.id desc
select from routing_consumers c left join users u on c.user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0 where c.id = #{id}
select from routing_consumers c left join users u on c.user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0 where c.secret_key = #{secretKey}
select count(1) from routing_rule_consumers where consumer_id = #{consumerId}
mapper.insert: insert into routing_consumers(consumer_code, name, user_id, secret_key, status) values(#{consumerCode}, #{name}, #{userId}, #{secretKey}, #{status})
